name: Raytheon Coyote Block 2 — Jet Interceptor
description: Jet-powered kinetic interceptor drone at 345-370 mph with 10-15 km range and tungsten warhead. 6,000+ rounds ordered by US Army. Paired with KuRFS radar (16 km detection range). Block 3 variant features HPM (high-power microwave) warhead that defeated a 10-drone swarm in testing.

name: Anduril Anvil — CV-Guided Interceptor
description: 200 mph interceptor quadcopter using computer vision for terminal guidance. Autonomous target engagement. Part of Anduril's Lattice AI ecosystem for integrated air defense.

name: Anduril Roadrunner-M — Reusable VTOL Interceptor
description: VTOL reusable interceptor with explosive warhead capable of engaging Group 1-5 UAS plus cruise missiles. Can be recovered and reused if target is not engaged. Represents next-gen C-UAS moving toward reusable autonomous interceptors.

name: CACI SkyTracker — RF Detection System
description: World's largest signals intelligence library for drone detection with 700+ deployed systems. Passive RF detection identifies drone protocols without jamming. Paired with BEAM for defeat capability.

name: CACI BEAM 3.0 — Backpack Jammer
description: Ultra-portable C-UAS jammer at only 3 lbs (1.4 kg). 3 km range dismount, 5 km mobile, 10+ km fixed-site. Pairs with SkyTracker for detect-and-defeat chain.

name: D-Fend Solutions EnforceAir2 — Protocol Takeover
description: Detects drones at 4.5 km (360° omni) and performs protocol takeover (not jamming) at 1.2-4 km range. Takes control of drone without disrupting surrounding RF environment. US JCO CaaS evaluation. Israeli technology.

name: Sentrycs — Direct Protocol Manipulation
description: Direct protocol manipulation C-UAS system without requiring preloaded signal libraries. Identifies and takes over drone control links in real-time. Integrated into Rafael Drone Dome system. Israeli technology.

name: Rafael Drone Dome — Integrated C-UAS System
description: Integrated C-UAS system combining RADA RPS-82 radar (5.6 km detection), RF detection (70 MHz-6 GHz), C-Guard jammer, and Lite Beam laser effector. Combat-proven with British Army and at G7 summits. Full detect-track-identify-defeat kill chain.
defeat_method: RF jamming + laser + cyber takeover (via Sentrycs)

name: DroneShield DroneGun Tactical — Rifle Jammer
description: Handheld rifle-form jammer at 7.3 kg covering 5 frequency bands plus GNSS. 2.5 km effective range. Point-and-shoot operation. $61.6M contract value. A$2.9B market cap. Australian/US company.

name: DroneShield RfPatrol Mk2 — Wearable Detector
description: Wearable passive RF drone detector at only 2.6 lbs (1.2 kg). Alerts operator to drone presence via smartphone app. No emissions — purely passive detection. Ideal for dismounted troops and personal protection.

name: DroneShield DroneSentry — Fixed-Site System
description: Fixed-site integrated C-UAS system combining RF detection, radar, camera tracking, and countermeasure deployment. Modular architecture for scalable perimeter protection.

name: Hensoldt Spexer 2000 3D — AESA Radar
description: 3D AESA (Active Electronically Scanned Array) radar tracking 300+ targets at 40 km range. Part of GUARDION integrated C-UAS system (ESG/Diehl + Hensoldt + R&S). 5 systems deployed with Bundeswehr. German defense-grade.

name: Rohde & Schwarz ARDRONIS Effect — Gapless Jammer
description: Gapless RF jammer covering 400 MHz to 6 GHz continuously at 250W. 24/7 operation capability. Part of GUARDION system with Hensoldt Spexer radar. No frequency gaps means no drone protocol can evade jamming.

name: Robin Radar ELVIRA — Bird/Drone Classifier
description: Micro-Doppler radar that classifies drones versus birds at 3-9 km range. Solves the critical false-alarm problem in C-UAS — most radar systems cannot distinguish birds from small drones. Dutch technology.

name: Aselsan IHTAR — Integrated C-UAS
description: Turkish integrated C-UAS system with radar detection, EO/IR tracking, RF jamming, and GNSS denial. Deployed with Turkish Armed Forces. Part of Aselsan's broader air defense product family alongside KORKUT and GÖKDENIZ.
defeat_method: RF jamming + GNSS denial + EO tracking
